name: instagram-follower
description: Open a real browser (Patchright + Chrome) and SLOWLY follow everyone who commented on given Instagram posts/reels, with hard-coded rate governors and an instant action-block tripwire so a precious marketing account does not get blocked.

account_age.title: Account age / standing
account_age.description: One of: aged (6+ months, clean) | under_6_months | new. Controls the safety limits. Lower = slower & safer.

working_hours_start.title: Activity start (local HH:MM)
working_hours_start.description: The tool only acts after this local time (looks human). Default 09:00.

working_hours_end.title: Activity end (local HH:MM)
working_hours_end.description: The tool stops acting after this local time. Default 22:30.

max_per_run.title: Max follows per single run
max_per_run.description: Caps how many follows one invocation performs (never spend the whole day's budget at once). Default 10.

follow_style.title: Follow style
follow_style.description: engage_then_follow (open profile, dwell, then Follow — recommended) | follow_only.

targets.title: Whom to follow
targets.description: commenters_and_replies (top-level commenters + threaded repliers — recommended) | commenters_only.
